rules.text: Controller must not create Cmd/Res/ExcelRow, template rows, or private toXxx/parseXxx helpers. Put boundary conversions in interface assembler.
Application service should not accumulate large toDTO/toDomain conversion methods. Put domain-to-DTO mapping in application assembler.
Use normal Chinese strings in source. Do not add Unicode escapes just because PowerShell displays mojibake; fix only actual mojibake in the file.
After completing each independently usable module, verify it, stage only module-related files, and commit immediately with a Chinese commit message. Do not include unrelated local files.
平台能力用于可选项目能力，例如 SSE、WebSocket、MQ、Neo4j、Python Runtime。默认禁用；禁用时不得初始化外部连接、声明中间件资源或强制项目配置外部依赖，启用后由能力配置驱动运行时连接与健康检查。
接口加密、双 token、API Key、Passkey、OAuth 等安全身份能力归 system 域；SSE、WebSocket、MQ、Neo4j 等可插拔工程能力归 platform 域，并且必须支持动态启停以避免无用中间件冗余。
平台能力禁用时必须同步释放运行时资源，例如关闭 WebSocket/SSE 会话、RabbitMQ 连接工厂、Neo4j Driver 缓存；不能只改 enabled 状态。
除 platform:capability 能力管理入口外，平台功能菜单应在对应能力关闭时从 /api/menu/routes 隐藏；能力 Provider 必须保持懒初始化，关闭状态不能连接中间件。
插件用户侧资源归属必须由后端从当前会话/PluginPrincipal/Sa 上下文推导，前端不得传 uploaderId、ownerId 等可伪造归属字段；如需管理员代操作，应设计独立管理用例和权限。

Frontend plugin styles used by dashboard cards and runtime pages must be injected through the plugin inline stylesheet (styles.css?inline), and install() must update an existing style tag textContent instead of returning early. Dev fallback and remote reload can keep stale style tags, so do not rely only on component scoped CSS for plugin dashboard cards.

Record-style lists that can grow without a small fixed bound, such as operation records, transactions, logs, audit rows, and import histories, must expose page/size in plugin HTTP APIs and show frontend pagination instead of loading a fixed 100/200 rows.

Authlib Injector service endpoint stays under /api/plugins/authlib-injector. Derive meta.links, skinDomains, and ALI from the current public request/texture URL; do not replace the authlib service address with the skin texture/yggdrasil path unless explicitly requested.

PluginDocumentStore caps page size at 200; plugin backend all-list scans and cross-plugin aggregations must loop pages with a <=200 page size instead of requesting 1000/10000, and frontend plugin bundles must be rebuilt because dist is ignored but packaged into plugin JARs.

Java Long/Snowflake IDs must cross JSON, plugin HTTP, SDK, and TypeScript boundaries as strings. Do not expose them as frontend number fields or call Number(id), otherwise JavaScript precision loss will make selects/saves query the wrong backend record.
插件前端涉及人员、部门选择时，不得暴露用户 ID 输入框；用后端 picker API 搜索/解析用户并以姓名、用户名、邮箱标签展示，历史 ID 只允许作为搜索兼容入口。
插件前端涉及人员、部门、服务器等选择器时，不得让用户手输或辨认内部 ID；优先复用宿主 UI 框架组件，如 Arco Modal/Table/Select/Tag，并用名称、账号、部门、服务器名等业务标签展示。

Project progress check-in frequency is a natural time bucket, not a rolling interval. For 1440 minutes, count at least one check-in per local calendar day 00:00-24:00; manual check-ins may repeat, while automatic Minecraft check-ins should dedupe within the current bucket.

Project progress managers count as project members. Assigning, randomly assigning, publishing assigned tasks, or claiming a detail must add assignees to the project member set. Deleting a project or detail must cascade related details, check-ins, acceptance records, and progress events.

Project progress acceptance evidence must be stored as ProjectFileEvidence, shown with summary on completed/detail/review views, and previewed/downloaded through authenticated SDK blob calls rather than raw object keys or direct URLs. Personal/member stats count assigned details, done-status completed details, pending acceptance details, accepted/rejected acceptance records for assigned details, and project-level check-ins.

After official business plugins are split into a standalone repository, the core host frontend must not auto-glob packages/plugin-*/src/index.ts in DEV mode. Default behavior should load remoteEntry.js from backend plugin assets; any cross-repo local debugging bridge must be explicit and must not make the core workspace depend on migrated plugin source.

Publish the stable plugin contract to GitLab Package Registry: yudream-plugin-spi is a standalone Maven artifact deployed with CI_JOB_TOKEN to the project Maven registry, and @yudream/plugin-sdk is a private npm package published by GitLab CI to the project npm registry. Split plugin repositories should consume them by version instead of inheriting the core root parent or workspace source.

The core repository root Maven reactor and GitLab CI must only build core modules plus yudream-plugin-spi. Business plugin modules may remain temporarily in the workspace for migration, but they should be treated as external repositories and runtime plugins loaded from the plugins/ directory instead of being part of the default core build.

Once official business plugins are migrated to yudream-admin-plugins, the core frontend pnpm workspace should keep only shared host packages such as components, plugin-sdk, dataviz, settings, and types. Do not keep packages/plugin-* in the default workspace manifest, or core install/build will still be implicitly coupled to migrated plugin source.

When shared frontend packages are renamed, update both source imports and generated auto-import/components d.ts references in core-arco-design-vue, otherwise CI vue-tsc may report missing modules and downstream implicit-any errors even if most source files already use the new package name.

utilities.example: const res = await apiExcel.exportUsers(params); saveExcelResponse(res, '用户管理.xlsx')
ExcelHttpSupport.write(response, "用户管理", "用户", UserExcelRow.class, rows);

utilities.text: Vue3 + Arco 动态表单优先使用 @form-create/arco-design 和 form-create-designer-arco-design；main.ts 全局 app.use(formCreate) 与 app.use(FcDesigner)，设计器用 fc-designer.getRule/getOption 保存 JSON，公开端用 form-create 渲染并自定义提交按钮。

pitfalls.text: User role assignment is department-scoped. Frontend and backend must avoid assigning roles outside the user's selected departments.
RustFS may reject S3 HeadBucket even when object operations can continue. Do not fail upload only because bucket head check is forbidden.

form-create designer rules are persisted as JSON, so function props such as upload onSuccess/customRequest are lost. Public/runtime dynamic form rendering must re-inject upload handlers, normalize backend file URLs for previews, and provide a public form-scoped upload endpoint instead of relying on the login-only common file upload API.
受保护的插件下载不能用 window.open 裸 URL；Sa-Token 只读请求头时浏览器直开不会带 Authorization。插件前端应通过宿主 SDK 的 blob/responseType=blob 请求下载，并从 Content-Disposition 解析文件名。
